data.name: The Bunker 69
data.detailed_description:
CHECK THIS OUT!


關於此遊戲

After 20 years of living in a terrible post-apocalyptic world, you find yourself in a miraculously undiscovered bunker, which... is filled with food and beautiful girls. It seems that your life is about to change, but... you can not even imagine how much.

This is a harem comic adventure, where you can become acquainted with four girls - the residents of the bunker. They are surprisingly very pleased with their new guest. Perhaps this is because they’ve never seen anyone from the "surface"? Or is there something else?
data.about_the_game:
After 20 years of living in a terrible post-apocalyptic world, you find yourself in a miraculously undiscovered bunker, which... is filled with food and beautiful girls. It seems that your life is about to change, but... you can not even imagine how much.

This is a harem comic adventure, where you can become acquainted with four girls - the residents of the bunker. They are surprisingly very pleased with their new guest. Perhaps this is because they’ve never seen anyone from the "surface"? Or is there something else?
data.short_description: After 20 years of living in a terrible post-apocalyptic world, you find yourself in a miraculously undiscovered bunker, which... is filled with food and beautiful girls. It seems that your life will now go according to a completely different script, but...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2DUO 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics Series. 1280x720 or better required
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Sound Devices compartible Direct Sound
